description_long: This humanoid robot features a sleek, red metallic body with black accents on its arms and hands, giving it a modern and slightly industrial appearance. Its head is round with two large, circular white eyes and no visible mouth or nose, evoking a friendly, approachable demeanor. The torso is robust and armored, with a central circular detail that may serve as a sensor or emblem. The arms are extended outward, each ending in a five-fingered hand with articulated joints, suggesting dexterity and expressive capability. The back is smooth and streamlined, with subtle panel lines and what appear to be access ports or fasteners. The overall design is compact and functional, with a focus on durability and urban utility.
description: A red and black humanoid robot with a round head, large white eyes, and articulated arms extended outward. Its design is sleek, durable, and expressive, suitable for urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the robot's round head with two large white eyes, outstretched articulated arms, and detailed chest panel.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the robot's head profile, arm extension, and the curvature of its torso and back.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, armored back, shoulder joints, and the backs of the robot's hands.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other profile of the head, arm, and torso curvature.
attribute_pose: The robot is in a gesturing pose with both arms extended outward and slightly upward, fingers splayed, head facing forward, and torso upright.
attribute_clothing_style: The robot is unclothed, featuring only integrated red and black metallic panels as its exterior covering.
attribute_facial_features: The face consists of a round head with two large, circular white eyes and no visible mouth or nose, giving it a simple, expressive appearance.
attribute_limb_articulation: The robot has articulated shoulders, elbows, and wrists, with five-fingered hands showing individual finger joints; no legs are visible.
attribute_presence_of_sensors: Visible sensors include two large circular eye-like components on the head, likely functioning as cameras or visual sensors.
